name: Monk
bio: A fallen ascetic, the Monk channels corrupted rage through sacred form, twisted into devastation.

skills.name: Retaliation
skills.description: Enter a retaliatory stance: next round, deal back the damage received as both Physical and Magical Damage. Permanently increase Armor and Magic Resist by 8%.

skills.name: Qi Burst
skills.description: Deal Physical Damage to opponent equal to (150% of Attack Damage + 40% of target's current HP).

skills.name: Energy Feedback
skills.description: Deal Magical Damage to opponent equal to (160% of Magic Power + 60% of target's Magic Power).

skills.name: Empty Slot
skills.description: This character has no fourth ability.

ultimate.name: Divine
ultimate.description: Permanently increase Armor, Magic Resist, Attack Damage, and Magic Power by 18%. Gain extreme Armor and Magic Resist for 2 rounds (non-stackable).
